summary: Journey Test #2 COMPLETE: Full RM Conversion Pipeline. All 37 tests passed (100%). Successfully tested the complete lifecycle: Enquiry/Callback Intake → Qualification → Shortlist → Quote → Site Visit → Negotiation → Commercial Accepted → Booking Readiness Gate → Booking Confirmed. Also tested invalid stage transitions, lost/reopen cycle, dashboard endpoints, and communication logging.

tests: all_ready = true when all checks pass
Final stage verified as 'booking_confirmed' with confirmed_at timestamp
GET /api/conversion/cases returns conversion cases with action-first data
GET /api/conversion/cases/{lead_id} returns full lead detail with shortlist, quotes, visits, negotiations, booking_readiness

critical_code_review_comments: conversion.py: Well-structured 839-line backend with clear stage pipeline and role permissions
conversion.py: STAGE_TRANSITIONS dict correctly enforces valid forward transitions
conversion.py: Admin can bypass stage transition validation (useful for data fixes)

conversion.py: Booking readiness gate has 6 comprehensive checks (requirement_confirmed, final_venue_selected, commercial_terms_agreed, customer_contact_confirmed, payment_milestone_recorded, booking_date_locked)
conversion.py: Quote workflow supports create/update with revision history
conversion.py: Site visit workflow supports full lifecycle (requested → proposed → scheduled → completed → cancelled)
conversion.py: Negotiation workflow supports counter history tracking
conversion.py: Lost/reopen cycle works correctly (lost → enquiry_received)
leads.py: Communication logging works correctly with channel, direction, summary, duration
leads.py: Shortlist management works correctly with venue details enrichment
seed_data_creation: Created test lead which progressed through full conversion pipeline to booking_confirmed status. Also created test data for shortlist, quotes, visits, negotiations, and communications.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey Test #2 complete. Full RM Conversion Pipeline verified working. Stage pipeline: enquiry_received → requirement_qualified → venues_shortlisted → quote_requested → quote_received → site_visit_planned → site_visit_completed → negotiation_in_progress → commercial_accepted → booking_confirmation_pending → booking_confirmed | lost. All RM operations working (intake, stage transitions, shortlist, quotes, visits, negotiations, booking readiness, communications). Invalid transitions correctly rejected. Lost/reopen cycle working.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking.
